name: ChatInterfaceBlueprint
description: A complete chat interface with message bubbles, input field, send button, typing indicator, and timestamps. Supports real-time agent messages via ggui_emit, typing indicators, and message status updates. Ideal for agent conversations, support chat, and messaging apps.

visual.description: Full-height layout with a header showing chat title and status, scrollable message area with left-aligned received and right-aligned sent bubbles, animated typing indicator, scroll-to-bottom button, and a bottom input bar with send button.
visual.layout: vertical stack with header, message area, and input bar

props.name: title
props.description: Chat title displayed in the header

props.name: initialMessages
props.description: Initial array of message objects with id, text, sender, and timestamp

props.name: currentUser
props.description: Identifier for the current user to determine sent vs received

stream.description: Real-time data contract for agent-to-component communication

message.description: New chat message from agent or system

typing.description: Show or hide the typing indicator

active.description: Whether the agent is currently typing

status.description: Update delivery status of a specific message

messageId.description: ID of the message to update

component.description: Embed a generated UI component inline in the chat as an iframe card

url.description: Render URL for the component iframe

title.description: Title displayed above the embedded component
